name: ShareYourPaper
label: Paper deposit
description: ShareYourPaper.org makes papers Open Access via self-archiving for free. It’s a quick way to increase a research paper’s impact for authors and libraries.
embed: Find the easiest way to share your paper

name: OA.Report
label: Open Access reporting
description: OA.Report helps organizations find their articles, measure their openness, and take action to increase their Open Access policy compliance.

name: OA.Support
label: Researcher help desk
tagline: A help desk for making papers Open Access.
description: OA.Support’s expert team helps libraries and funders answer author questions within 24 hours, remind researchers of outreach that may have been missed, and report on authors progress and challenges.
